description_long: This object is a modern sofa set consisting of three pieces: a two-seater sofa and two matching armchairs. The design is boxy and geometric, with straight lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The upholstery appears to be a dark, solid color fabric, likely a deep charcoal or black, with a smooth, matte finish. The armrests are broad and squared, matching the height of the backrests, and the seat and back cushions are uniform and integrated into the frame. The legs are short, blocky, and positioned at the corners, barely visible beneath the base. This set would be suitable for outdoor urban environments such as parks, plazas, or communal seating areas.
description: A modern, boxy sofa set in dark fabric with straight lines, broad armrests, and integrated cushions. Includes a two-seater and two armchairs, all with short, blocky legs.
description_view_0: Angled view showing the front and side of the two-seater sofa and one armchair, highlighting the broad armrests and uniform cushions.
description_view_1: Direct front view displaying the full width of the two-seater sofa and both armchairs, emphasizing the symmetrical arrangement and straight lines.
description_view_2: Angled rear view showing the back and side of the armchairs and the two-seater, with the blocky legs partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear view of the set, focusing on the straight, unadorned backs of the sofas and the uniform height of the backrests.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three seat units each with a single, uniform seat cushion and a single, uniform back cushion, all cushions appear attached and integrated into the frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are present, broad, straight, and squared, matching the height of the backrest with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Each piece has four short, blocky legs positioned at the corners, legs are minimally visible and likely made of wood or metal with a simple, functional design.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrests are straight, high, and continuous, matching the width of each seat unit, with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid in color with a smooth, matte texture and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
